title: Upgrade-like Armor trims
description: Changes the Armor Trim item texture to look more like the Netherite Upgrade
body:
This is a Recourse Pack that changes the Armor Trim item texture to look more like the Netherite Upgrade item texture. My goal was to make it all as "vanilla-like" as possible so that you could use this pack without even realising that these arent the actual vanilla textures.

**This is a temporary update to the "Upgrade-like trims" resource pack.
from the moment the original resource pack starts updating, updates will stop coming to this one**
